authority.rule: Patch 107 may commit Patch106 evidence-based batch queue decisions into engine_review_ledger_v1 only after queue decision, Patch103 approval helper, Patch102 cross-check, evidence binder, live candidate path, and live file SHA rechecks. writes: Forge-owned plan/receipt files only until explicit confirm token
